# Writing RCT Protocols and Informed Consent

::: {.callout-note}
## Drafting note
Chapter content in progress. Migrate the corresponding text here; use `$...$` / `$$...$$` for math, place figures in `images/`, and use ```{r} or ```{python} code blocks.
:::

## Writing an RCT protocol

_To be added._

## Writing informed consent

_To be added._

## Appendix: A multicenter trial protocol example

_To be added._
